login.subtitle: Sign in to your control plane
login.failed: Login failed. Please check your credentials.
login.connectionError: Unable to connect. Please try again.

twoFactor.subtitle: Enter your authentication code
twoFactor.label: Authentication Code
twoFactor.failed: Invalid code. Please sign in again.

setup.title: Set Up LabTether
setup.subtitle: create your first admin
setup.connectionError: Unable to connect. Please try again.

remoteAccess.title: Remote Access
remoteAccess.subtitle: optional but recommended
remoteAccess.description: Tailscale HTTPS is optional, but it is the easiest trusted remote-access path for a Docker-hosted hub.
remoteAccess.skipNote: You can finish setup without it and enable it later in Settings.

step1.title: 1. Install and sign into Tailscale on the Docker host
step1.description: LabTether stays in Docker. Tailscale Serve runs on the host and proxies to LabTether locally.

step2.title: 2. Run the recommended host command
step2.fallback: The exact command appears here after Tailscale is installed and the host is logged in.

step3.title: 3. Verify it here
step3.description: Use Verify after you finish the host-side step. If you want, you can skip this and turn it on later in Settings.

remoteAccess.detectedDescription: LabTether inspects the Docker host and checks whether Tailscale HTTPS is ready.
remoteAccess.managedDescription: This deployment allows LabTether to configure `tailscale serve` directly on the host.
remoteAccess.enabledMessage: Tailscale HTTPS enabled on the host.
remoteAccess.disabledMessage: Tailscale HTTPS disabled on the host.
remoteAccess.continueNowDescription: Skip Tailscale for now and finish setup. You can enable it later in Settings.
remoteAccess.finishRecommendedDescription: If Verify shows Tailscale HTTPS is active, continue and use that trusted `ts.net` URL.
